comment.body:
Short vol, short vomma is owned. But don't be complacent. Read my weekly post carefully and read between the lines!
I can’t say much, but the negotiations in Jeddah are making slow, steady progress. Our politicians are working through sensitive issues. To achieve Middle East peace, there must first be a stable U.S.–Russia relationship, because the Arabs respect Putin.

Funds are prepared for the next market event. As I’ve mentioned, the goal now is to re-inject liquidity into the market, prompting many bears to capitulate. Meanwhile, I’m using these opportunities to build a lifeboat.

It’s not over yet. This drop still isn’t enough to support a sustained QE

comment.body: My probably wrong interpretation please tell me all the things I'm getting wrong so we can all help each other learn : MM long fly centre at 5830, I assume we are in positive vanna from 5730 ish up, so if vol crushes it is supportive to 5830 where we could pin.  We would need higher vol above 5830 to go much further up and higher vol below to go significantly lower. Negative not particularly steep speed above centre 5830 and positive speed below.
